title: (Bullish Signal) KRNT price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on April 06, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 44 similar cases, and 41 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $103.27 crossed the resistance line at $104.08 and is trading between $104.08 resistance and $101.15 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/04/21 - 04/06/21, the price experienced a +9% Uptrend. During the week of 03/29/21 - 04/06/21, the stock enjoyed a +19% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/vj4sd3ofjrr61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=791be1d70cbd3efe7de9c22b3949497895c1cf2c

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 06, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on KRNT as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 77 of 91 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for KRNT just turned positive on April 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where KRNT's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 43 of 53 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

Following a +7.79% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where KRNT advanced for three days, in 269 of 327 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.
